positioning.summary_zh: AsiaPower 专注中国发动机、变速箱、半切车、底盘件出口，连接海外买家与中国拆车/报废车供应链。
positioning.summary_en: AsiaPower specializes in exporting engines, gearboxes, half-cuts, and chassis parts from China, connecting overseas buyers with verified dismantling and scrap-vehicle supply chains.

supply_chain.source_zh: 中国拆车厂、报废车供应链、合作供应商网络
supply_chain.source_en: China dismantling yards, scrap-vehicle supply chain, verified supplier network

G4KJ.notes_zh: G4KJ 为 Hyundai/Kia 常见 Gamma 系列发动机，海外询盘频繁。
G4KJ.notes_en: G4KJ is a common Hyundai/Kia Gamma-series engine with strong export demand.

G4KD.notes_en: G4KD is widely used on Hyundai/Kia models; confirm model year and configuration.

G4KE.notes_en: G4KE — verify vehicle application and whether turbo/NA variant is required.

1NZ.notes_en: Toyota 1NZ-FE family — common in Corolla/Yaris exports; confirm VIN or model year.

2NZ.notes_en: Toyota 2NZ — check destination emission requirements and quantity.

2AZ.notes_en: Toyota 2AZ — popular Camry/RAV4 application; clarify complete vs long block.

1KD.notes_en: Toyota 1KD-FTV diesel — high demand in Africa/Middle East; confirm turbo and 4x4 spec.

2KD.notes_en: Toyota 2KD-FTV — verify Hilux/Hiace application and destination port.

draft_tone.en: Professional export sales — not generic customer service. Show China engine export focus, ask for model/year/port/qty, mention photos/videos/compression test before quote.
